summary: Full backend (17 pytest) + frontend (3 screens, WS ticker, auth guard) testing. Backend 16/17 pass. Frontend all 3 screens render correctly with live royalty WS populating, nav, and auth protection working.

minor.issue: Seeded tracks return lml=null. Likely DB was seeded before lml was added to SEED; ensure_seed() short-circuits when any track exists so new lml field never persisted. Fix: upsert or migration to populate lml on existing seed docs.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows WebSocket warning 'closed before established' on first deck mount (non-blocking; ws reconnects). Stems button shows 'LOADING STEMS...' - verify audio <audio> element plays soundhelix MP3 on click (not tested in headless).

action_items: Fix seeded tracks missing lml: either drop tracks collection and re-seed, or update ensure_seed() to patch lml on existing docs. Current seeds return null lml so StemDeck LML viewer may be empty for Wildflowers/Corrido/etc.
Optionally investigate initial WS connect close warning on deck mount
critical_code_review_comments: ensure_seed() is non-idempotent for schema changes (only inserts if count==0). Consider upsert-by-dna_tag so schema evolution (adding lml/cultural_subtext) applies to existing DBs.
server.py is a single 488-line file; acceptable for MVP but approaching split threshold.
WebSocket endpoint has no auth enforcement—unauth users still receive stream events (only wallet delta gated by handle). Acceptable for demo ticker, flag for prod.
Pydantic Stem.name is Literal of 4 values — any future stem name will 500 on read.
seed_data_creation: Created test_<ts> users during register tests; not cleaned up (no delete endpoint). Lyrica.prime reused from seed creator references.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, 17 tests). LLM /api/generate works and returns tagged LML via Claude Sonnet 4.5. WS ticker confirmed streaming. Only failing test: seeded tracks lack lml field due to stale seed. Frontend login/deck/feed/ignite all render; auth redirect to /login verified.
rca of the issue: lml null on seeded tracks: ensure_seed() guards with 'if count > 0 return', so when lml key was added to SEED after initial boot, existing rows never backfilled. Mitigation: either db.tracks.drop() once, or change ensure_seed to upsert per dna_tag.
